violations.text: The ceiling air vents and plastic vent tiles in the retail area were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

Several ceiling tiles throughout the retail area were observed to be stained (Water stained) and in poor repair. Stained/moldy ceiling tiles to be replaced and maintained in good repair, and to aid in monitoring for any possible active leaks during weather events. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
